title: Smelt a gold ingot
goal: Make a gold_ingot. You start with raw_gold, coal, and a furnace in your inventory — place the furnace and smelt the raw gold into a gold ingot.
rationale: Mid-horizon smelting: place a furnace, pick the right fuel, smelt raw_gold -> gold_ingot. Isolates resource/furnace reasoning and fuel selection without long-horizon mining luck — short and reliable enough to run live while still exposing how two models plan.
